title: Discussing Pocket Money 讨论零花钱

lines.en: Dad, can I have some more pocket money?
lines.zh: 爸爸，可以多给我一些零花钱吗？

lines.en: How much do you get every week now?
Twenty yuan. But it is not enough.
What do you spend it on?
I buy some snacks and a new comic book sometimes.
lines.zh: 我买些零食，有时候买新的漫画书。

lines.en: How about you save some money each week?
lines.zh: 你每周存一些钱怎么样？

lines.en: I want to save for a new bike.
lines.zh: 我想存钱买一辆新自行车。

lines.en: That is a good goal. I will give you thirty yuan a week.
lines.zh: 好目标。我每周给你三十元。

lines.en: Thank you, Dad! I will save half of it.
lines.zh: 谢谢你，爸爸！我会存一半的。

lines.en: That is very responsible. I am proud of you.
lines.zh: 很有责任心。我为你骄傲。
